      command - the command to serialize
      Returns:
      the JSON representation of the command

      public static ICommand createAddExampleDefinitionCommand(String definitionName, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode from)
      Creates a command to add a new reusable example definition to the document.

      definitionName - the name of the example definition
      from - the source object for the example definition
      Returns:
      the command

      description - an optional description
      Returns:
      the command

    • createAddLinkCommand

      public static ICommand createAddLinkCommand(Node parent, String linkName, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode from)
      Creates a command to add a link to a response or components.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent node (response or components)
      linkName - the name of the link
      from - the link definition as a JSON object
      Returns:
      the command

    • createDeleteLinkCommand

      public static ICommand createDeleteLinkCommand(Node parent, String linkName)
      Creates a command to delete a link from a response or components.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent node (response or components)
      linkName - the name of the link to delete
      Returns:
      the command

      public static ICommand createAddCallbackCommand(Node parent, String callbackName, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode from)
      Creates a command to add a callback to an operation or components.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent node (operation or components)
      callbackName - the name of the callback
      from - the callback definition as a JSON object
      Returns:
      the command

      Creates a command to delete a callback from an operation or components.
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent node (operation or components)
      callbackName - the name of the callback to delete
      Returns:
      the command
